beginner.current_priority_copy: Focus on growth first, not hard selling.
beginner.dont_copy: Avoid sales-heavy hooks. Build trust with one clear promise + soft engagement, then add CTA later.
beginner.result_usage_hint: Best use: drive views before adding CTA.

rising.current_priority_copy: Traffic first with repeatable formats—then add one gentle CTA.
rising.dont_copy: Avoid jumping between unrelated angles or stacking multiple asks. Keep CTA simple and late (after proof).
rising.result_usage_hint: Best use: keep discovery consistent; one CTA after a proof beat.

active.current_priority_copy: Balanced execution: discovery + one clear CTA per post.
active.dont_copy: Avoid stuffing hard-sell language and vague hype together. Pick a single CTA goal and make it concrete.
active.result_usage_hint: Best use: split effort between hooks and one CTA—no extra asks.

advanced.current_priority_copy: Conversion-ready: pair proof with one strong next step.
advanced.dont_copy: Avoid aggressive offers in the hook. Lead with problem + proof, then end with one action (comment/save/DM/link).
advanced.result_usage_hint: Best use: proof-led conversion—one CTA at the end.

monetization_mode_to_hint.affiliate: Your current style fits affiliate-style short-form: keep recommendations honest, niche-tight, and trust-first.
monetization_mode_to_hint.product_selling: Your current style fits product promotion: use a proof-led structure and place the offer after retention is earned.
monetization_mode_to_hint.personal_brand: Your current style fits personal brand content: stay consistent in voice, then add a light CTA tied to your topic.
monetization_mode_to_hint.lead_generation: Your current style fits lead-gen workflows: end with one low-friction action and match it to your service proof.
monetization_mode_to_hint.ad_driven_growth: Your current style fits ad-driven growth: optimize hooks for retention, then convert with one clean engagement CTA.

result_usage_hints.growth: Best use: drive views before adding CTA.
result_usage_hints.balanced: Best use: discovery first, one CTA after proof.
result_usage_hints.revenue: Best use: pair one proof beat with a clear CTA.
